info.title: WIB Middleware API
info.description:
Backend API contract for the myAccount React SPA.
This middleware sits between the React frontend and the legacy Symfony 3.4 backend (asigurari.ro).

## Authentication
- **Login** returns either full tokens (access_token + refresh_token) or a pre_auth_token when 2FA is required.
- **Access tokens** are short-lived RS256 JWTs (15 min). Send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
- **Refresh tokens** are opaque strings (7-day TTL). Send in the POST body to `/api/auth/refresh`.
- **Pre-auth tokens** are short-lived JWTs (5 min, scope=pre_auth) used only for the 2FA verification step.

## Naming Convention
- **Request bodies**: snake_case for multi-word fields (e.g. `refresh_token`, `pre_auth_token`, `new_password`).
- **Response bodies**: camelCase (e.g. `accessToken`, `policyNumber`, `createdAt`).
- This is documented per-field in each schema. The frontend should follow these conventions exactly.

## Error Format
All errors follow this structure:
```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "MACHINE_READABLE_CODE",
    "message": "Human-readable description.",
    "details": { "field": ["Validation message."] }
  }
}
```
The `details` key is only present for `VALIDATION_ERROR` responses.

## Rate Limiting
Sensitive endpoints are rate-limited per IP. When exceeded, a `429 TOO_MANY_REQUESTS` error is returned.

## Error Codes Reference
| Code | HTTP | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| INVALID_CREDENTIALS | 401 | Wrong email or password |
| INVALID_PASSWORD | 400 | Wrong current password (change/disable 2FA) |
| INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN | 401 | Expired or revoked refresh token |
| INVALID_RESET_CODE | 400 | Wrong or expired OTP code |
| INVALID_RESET_TOKEN | 400 | Wrong or expired reset token |
| INVALID_TWO_FACTOR_CODE | 400 | Wrong TOTP/email OTP code |
| TWO_FACTOR_REQUIRED | 200 | 2FA step needed (returns pre_auth_token) |
| USER_ALREADY_EXISTS | 409 | Email or username already taken |
| TOO_MANY_REQUESTS | 429 | Rate limit exceeded |
| VALIDATION_ERROR | 422 | Request body validation failed (see details) |
| SAME_PASSWORD | 422 | New password same as current |
| INVALID_2FA_METHOD | 422 | Method must be "totp" or "email" |
| INVALID_PRE_AUTH_TOKEN | 422 | Invalid or expired pre-auth token |
| POLICY_NOT_FOUND | 404 | Policy not found or access denied |
| QUOTE_NOT_FOUND | 404 | Quote not found or access denied |
| NOTIFICATION_NOT_FOUND | 404 | Notification not found or access denied |
| REMINDER_NOT_FOUND | 404 | Reminder not found or access denied |
| SESSION_NOT_FOUND | 404 | Session not found or access denied |
| UNAUTHORIZED | 401 | Missing or invalid JWT |
| FORBIDDEN | 403 | Insufficient permissions |
| NOT_FOUND | 404 | Route not found |

422.description: Invalid pre-auth token or wrong 2FA method

Bearer.description: RS256 JWT access token (15 min TTL)

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication, registration, password reset, and 2FA management.
